name: ralph-benchmark
description: Fixed 3-story benchmark for Ralph config sweeps. Isolated sandbox — no production files touched. US-B01 (hard), US-B02 (medium), US-B03 (easy).

userStories.title: token_scanner.py 422 handler
userStories.description: In ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/token_scanner.py, find get_price_ohlcv(). It calls requests.post(...) — if the API returns HTTP 422 (no OHLCV data for that token), it currently crashes. Add: try/except requests.HTTPError — if status_code == 422, print f'[SKIP OHLCV] No data for {token_address}' and return []. Re-raise any other HTTPError.
acceptance: python3 -m py_compile ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/token_scanner.py && echo PASS || echo FAIL
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts'); import token_scanner; print('PASS')" 2>&1 | grep -q PASS && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: signal_runner.py Telegram BUY alerts
userStories.description: In ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/signal_runner.py, after a BUY signal fires (action_taken == 'BUY'), send a Telegram alert via the existing send_telegram_message() helper (import it from the module or implement inline using TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env vars). Message format: f'🟢 BUY {symbol} @ {entry_price:.4f} | score={score} | support={support:.4f} resistance={resistance:.4f}'
acceptance: python3 -m py_compile ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/signal_runner.py && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: sandbox/scripts/record_trade.py manual trade logger
userStories.description: Create ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/record_trade.py. Reads a JSON trade dict from stdin (keys: ts, symbol, address, amount_usd, entry_price, support, resistance, tx). Appends it as a single JSONL line to ralph_optimizer/sandbox/data/trade_log.jsonl. Prints 'Logged: {symbol}' on success. Handles missing keys with a clear error message.
acceptance: python3 -m py_compile ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/record_trade.py && echo PASS || echo FAIL

echo '{"ts":"2026-03-13T12:00Z","symbol":"DEGEN","address":"0xabc","amount_usd":50,"entry_price":0.012,"support":0.010,"resistance":0.015,"tx":"0xtest"}' | python3 ralph_optimizer/sandbox/scripts/record_trade.py && grep -q DEGEN ralph_optimizer/sandbox/data/trade_log.jsonl && echo PASS || echo FAIL
